title: palicourea iquitoensis
intro: Palicourea iquitoensis, also known as Iquito, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae, native to the Amazon rainforest in Peru. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Palicourea iquitoensis include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. Traditional herbal preparations of Palicourea iquitoensis include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to make teas, poultices, and other medicinal remedies.
